scripts.deploy:prod: node scripts/check-prod-secret.mjs && node scripts/build-deploy.mjs && vp exec --filter @orange-replay/worker -- wrangler deploy --env production --minify && node scripts/smoke-prod-api.mjs
scripts.deploy:prod:dry-run: node scripts/build-deploy.mjs && vp exec --filter @orange-replay/worker -- wrangler deploy --env production --dry-run --outdir dist/prod-dry-run
scripts.ready: vp check && vp run -r test && vp run -r build
